projects.title: KFC Clone
projects.description: A full-stack collaborative project at Masai School. Goal was to create a full-stack clone of the KFC website as close as possible. Built by a team of 4 developers in 5 days.

projects.title: MedsPharma
projects.description: MedsPharma is a consumer healthcare online-app that provides customers on-demand access to all products and lets them purchase according to their needs.

projects.title: Meesho Clone
projects.description: A clone of meesho.com providing online shopping for a wide variety of clothes and electronic products. Led the team as project manager and main contributor.

experiences.description:
-Built and maintained Admin Panel and User Panel using React.js with responsive and scalable UI components.
-Led the end-to-end design and development of an AI-powered Applicant Tracking System (ATS) from scratch.
-Designed and developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js to support core application workflows.
-Implemented microservices-based backend architecture to improve scalability, performance, and maintainability.
-Integrated AI-driven features using ChatGPT API to automate candidate screening, communication, and workflow intelligence.
-Designed and automated complex business workflows using n8n, reducing manual operations and improving system efficiency.
-Implemented Elasticsearch for advanced search, filtering, and high-performance data retrieval.
-Containerized services using Docker and deployed applications on DigitalOcean with production-ready configurations.
-Managed Cloudflare for DNS, security, and performance optimization.

-A tech company specializing in Digital Marketing and software solutions.
-Delivered 4 projects as the primary React.js developer
-Admin Panel for a product
-Business-facing web view of the same product
-Community service platform for London-based students
Static shop website
-Built scalable, modular, and reusable React.js components

TECH STACK :
React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Wordpress Netlify and Render
-Role-based admin panel with authorization (Admin, Editor, User)
-Solely responsible for project development and deployment
-Secure authentication (account lockout after 5 failed login attempts; only Admin could unblock)
-Additionally contributed to building and maintaining an e-commerce WordPress website
Honed skills in mobile app development, collaborating with a team to deliver efficient and user-friendly solutions using React Native.

about.bio: I am Mohd Monish and I am a full-stack MERN Developer. Since childhood, I have always been excited to work on computers. After passing my intermediate examination, I decided to take up software development. During the pandemic, I decided to learn coding on my own and that is how I figured out my passion for this field, after which I joined a coding bootcamp and began my journey toward becoming a Full Stack Web Developer.
